programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: DNA evidence suggests that the bloodsucking beast known as the Chupacabra has been found and that there are two versions of this terrifying creature.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: Recently disclosed audio recordings and photographs provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the beast with horns known as the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: Evidence reveals a Vietnam War pilot may have come home with a secret cargo, a viscous man-ape cryptid that could be the missing link in human evolution.

programme.title: Monsters Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Bigfoot is caught on camera; a crazed cryptid goes on the attack; a sea monster washes ashore; a dire wolf terrorizes the Canadian woods.

programme.title: Monsters Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A prehistoric terror lurks above; a sea monster surfaces; strange creatures of the night walk the streets of California; a cave cryptid is spotted in the Alps.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Months after the Northern California expedition, Bryce, Mireya, and Russell head to Washington after a fresh lead points to a target zone where Bigfoot groups are congregating for an unknown reason; Survivalist Biko Wright joins the hunt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: South of a Bigfoot chokepoint in Washington, Russell follows a trail of warning signs into the backcountry; Mireya and Biko track what could be a curious Bigfoot; Bryce speaks with a witness, who wishes he never laid eyes on the cryptid creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Loch Ness Monster: New Evidence
programme.desc: Professor Neil Gemmell uses cutting-edge DNA science to unravel the mystery of the Loch Ness monster; he puts the leading theories to the ultimate scientific test and launches a new chapter in the hunt for Nessie.

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: A terrified couple calls for help after witnessing a chair levitate in their home; Amy endures a chilling paranormal experience in an upstairs bedroom; a psychic's visit later reveals a horrifying truth that leaves Adam and Amy shocked.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: A full-bodied apparition terrorizes two young girls at night and Adam and Amy catch it on camera; a heinous murder committed more than 100 years ago might help close the investigation.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: A distraught woman in Flatwoods, Ky., claims an evil presence in her home killed her best friend; she's terrified that if Amy and Steve can't uncover the source of the violent paranormal activity, she and her sister may be next.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: A Michigan mom's life crumbles as the dead invade her home; she makes a desperate plea to Steve and Amy to make sense of the unexplained activity and save her family from an entity called the Tall Killer.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Amy and Steve travel to Northfield, Ohio, to help a desperate mother who claims an evil presence is threatening her children and tearing her marriage apart.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy answer a call from a scared single mother whose family is being terrorized by the paranormal, and she fears the dark entities running rampant in her home may destroy the life she has worked so hard to build.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to Pennsylvania to investigate a former home for the destitute and elderly, determined to conquer the terror inside; but things go horribly wrong during a dire paranormal-induced emergency.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team investigates a Texas hospital that has a gruesome history, including a brutal double homicide; the abandoned building's chapel may house a demonic entity.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team investigates a former Montana prison haunted by dark entities known for choking, shanking and possessing visitors; one team member must overcome his fear of violent spirits to survive the night behind the walls of the vile place.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota, Chelsea and Tanner head home to face the horror of their childhood nightmares, Minnesota's most-notorious sanatorium.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota brings the road trip to its most chilling overnight yet, inside a shuttered Wisconsin asylum; this will be the first team ever to sleep inside its abandoned halls, where little is known about why several nurses took their own lives.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Convinced total isolation and disorientation is the only way to push fear to its limits, Dakota leads the team to Ebensburg, Pa., to investigate a dungeon deep in the bowels of the old Cambria County Jail.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota leads Chelsea, Tanner and Alex to a decaying sanitarium where some patient corpses were unclaimed due to a flu pandemic; screams and darting shadows play mind games with the team as they struggle to pin the activity on the living or the dead.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Exploring one of America's oldest bourbon distilleries.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team returns to Indiana to explore an abandoned facility that has haunted Tanner's nightmares for the past five years; he has only now mustered up the courage to confront who -- or what -- terrorized him during their first investigation.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: It's sweet revenge for Chelsea when she takes the team to Chicago's terrifying Joliet Prison; terrible things happen once they separate inside its walls.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Tanner confronts his greatest fear when the team explores an upstate New York asylum that is said to be haunted by the spirit of a 7-foot-tall man.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to West Virginia to explore a asylum in America; Dakota has doubts about their ability to combat the bloodthirsty souls lurking in the shadows of the cursed property, but Tanner believes they are up for the challenge!

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team returns to Indiana to explore an abandoned facility that has haunted Tanner's nightmares for the past five years; he has only now mustered up the courage to confront who -- or what -- terrorized him during their first investigation.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: It's sweet revenge for Chelsea when she takes the team to Chicago's terrifying Joliet Prison; terrible things happen once they separate inside its walls.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Tanner confronts his greatest fear when the team explores an upstate New York asylum that is said to be haunted by the spirit of a 7-foot-tall man.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to West Virginia to explore a asylum in America; Dakota has doubts about their ability to combat the bloodthirsty souls lurking in the shadows of the cursed property, but Tanner believes they are up for the challenge!

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: In Morgan City, La., police call paranormal investigators to the site of a shape-shifting mist near the town's lake; the mayor reports that the paranormal activity has spread throughout St. Mary Parish.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The team arrives at a home where an eerie ghost girl has been befriending children for generations; when they discover a darker entity lurking in the home, the investigators must figure out how the two spirits are related.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The team investigates a limbless phantom at a historic plantation in Patterson, La.; they soon face more spirits than they bargained for after discovering a connection to voodoo and the deadly yellow fever epidemic.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: A call from the Morgan City police sends the team to Louisiana's Atchafalaya Basin, where a trapper reports seeing two men vanish into thin air; a "Naked and Afraid" contestant reveals evidence of a dangerous pirate's spirit.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The bizarre report of a solider's ghost at an antebellum home brings the team to Franklin, La.; as they attempt to contact the spirit, they discover the plantation was seized by Union forces before the Battle of Irish Bend.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The team takes on poltergeist activity connected to a gruesome murder in Berwick, La.; the case hits close to home after they link a baby doll from the crime scene to paranormal activity at their own headquarters.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The team uncovers the shocking history behind the location of their headquarters after an alarm is tripped at Morgan City's archives building; a surprise witness turns their investigation on its head.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City
programme.desc: The team investigates downtown Morgan City after construction workers discover skeletal remains under the street; they turn to the community for help putting the town's spirits to rest.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Properties once owned by John Mackay are investigated; an unseen force pushes Jay down the stairs; a spirit causes a light bulb to explode.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
